title: Glucose Revolution
author: Jessie Inchauspé
subline: Eat your food in the right order.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A glucose curve over 4 hours — the post-meal spike. The peak crosses a red dashed line marked 'DANGER'. The book argues: lower the peak. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1000)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- Axes -->
    <line x1="-600" y1="200" x2="600" y2="200" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="-600" y1="200" x2="-600" y2="-300" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- DANGER red dashed line (peak threshold) -->
    <line x1="-600" y1="-100" x2="600" y2="-100" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="8 6"/>
    <text x="-620" y="-95" text-anchor="end" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">DANGER</text>
    <!-- The glucose curve: a sharp peak that crosses the red line -->
    <path d="M -600 200 L -400 200 Q -200 200 -100 80 Q 0 -160 200 -180 Q 400 -200 500 60 Q 580 200 600 200" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- Fill below the curve in ash -->
    <path d="M -600 200 L -400 200 Q -200 200 -100 80 Q 0 -160 200 -180 Q 400 -200 500 60 Q 580 200 600 200 L 600 200 Z" fill="#1a1a1a" opacity="0.5"/>
    <!-- The peak dot (RED) where the curve touches DANGER -->
    <circle cx="100" cy="-160" r="10" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <text x="100" y="-180" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">SPIKE</text>
    <!-- The endpoint: 4 hours later, settled back to baseline -->
    <text x="-600" y="240" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">MEAL · 0H</text>
    <text x="0" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">+1H</text>
    <text x="200" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">+2H</text>
    <text x="400" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">+3H</text>
    <text x="600" y="240" text-anchor="end" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">+4H</text>
    <!-- Y axis label -->
    <text x="-640" y="-280" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">mg/dL</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A 4-hour glucose curve crossing a red dashed DANGER line at the spike peak. The curve is the cover — a literal chart of post-meal blood sugar. 280px whisper title at the bottom.
